query: robotic brachytherapy needle insertion systems technical specifications

results.title: Robotic brachytherapy of the prostate.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 20201771. 2009/01/01 00:00. OBJECTIVE: Minimally invasive surgery decreases postoperative morbidity 
after radical hysterectomy (RH) for early-stage cervical cancer. However, a 
randomized trial and large retrospective data question its safety after 
observing lower rates of survival than open surgery []. The causes of this 
higher recurrence rate are not definitely established but may result from cancer 
exposure to the peritoneum during vaginal section and cancerous cells' spillage

results.title: Robotic MR-guided high dose rate brachytherapy needle implantation in the prostate (ROBiNSon)-a proof-of-concept study.
